calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant David Casselman.
Default entered against defendants on October 16, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 16, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant David Casselman as follows:

Damages/Principal - $169,893.79.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,144.60.
Attorney's Fees -$2,500.00.
Costs - $410.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $178,948.39.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
